meaning: n.模仿,效法,冒充,赝品,仿造物
examples: A child learns to talk by imitation.
They discussed important issues in imitation of their elders.
Many corporate methods have been adopted by American managers in imitation of Japanese practice.
The figures also include one nine-year-old listed for possessing a firearm or imitation firearm.
Imitation is a common source of trouble and loss in the market for contemporary Chinese art.
